positive: A mystical celestial forest gathering, stylized as a neo-vintage botanical etching illustration, featuring glowing bioluminescent flora, oversized stylized ferns, graceful winged moths, and hidden ethereal fauna silhouettes. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, focusing on deep contrast between rich, saturated jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, amethyst) and stark, velvety blacks. The art style should mimic detailed woodcut or engraved printing, with clean, crisp line work and bold, flat color areas suitable for a textile print. High detail, perfect symmetry, 360-degree view, flat vector print art, concept art.
